Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Let's activate our radar systems so we can begin detecting contacts. You can right click on the ship to see the Sensors option, then click on both Air and Surface search radar options to turn them on.
You can also access these controls by hitting the EMCON button at bottom right of the screen.
Setting our sensors to EMCON using either of these menus will shut down all radar emissions, allowing us to stay undetected for longer.
